name: commit-write-message
default_program:
[stages: preflight>detect>analyze>handoff>audit |
 scope: diff |
 policy: evidence,deterministic-output |
 lens: minto-pyramid |
 output: md(contract=v1)]

required_inputs.name: DIFF_SUMMARY
required_inputs.description: Diff or structured summary of the completed changes.

required_inputs.name: CHANGE_INTENT
required_inputs.description: What the change was meant to accomplish.
